svg.title: Manhwa to Video Pipeline — Final Flowchart
svg.desc: End-to-end flowchart using llama3.2-vision:11b via Ollama, from raw scans to narrated chapter video.

g.text: compare all 30 JSONs · build global emotion arc · judge chapter mood
LLM writes narration per page · emotion-aware · saved back to JSON
